must_detect.matched_text:
Market-facing documents follow public-source controls; the already-announced Pelham Tech Ltd combination (first published 12/03/2024) is retained as public record.
MNPI handling: embargo date for Q3 trading update drafts set to 30/09/2025 07:00 BST; access limited to IR and cosec roles.
Negated MAC language: current diligence notes state no material adverse change observed and no definitive agreement executed as at this workflow stage.
Lawful basis: legitimate interests for market-abuse monitoring and legal obligation under uk mar recordkeeping; staff fair processing notices are published on our website.
Retention: deal checklists and board memos kept 7 years from public announcement; prerelease research notes deleted within 90 days post-publication; invalid ids like ISIN GB00ZZZZZZZ9 in drafts are treated as placeholders.
DSAR: requests via subjectrights@firbankmercantile.co.uk or postal form FRM-DSAR-UK-01; we search journals, archives, and role mailboxes; we will not disclose embargoed MNPI until the public release time passes.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
